question.label: Team bar mismatch
question.name: When your wins miss the team bar, where does the mismatch usually show up?
question.description: Drills into his stated uncertainty about the team bar by locating the recurring mismatch in concrete work.

answer: Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.

assessment.note: He names a recurring quality gap — inconsistency under time pressure — which confirms a strong clarity shortfall around the team bar in practice.

new_queue.label: Time pressure consistency
new_queue.name: Under time pressure, what usually slips first in your work?

new_queue.label: Quality in examples
new_queue.name: What does good brand design look like in your work right now?

new_queue.label: Feedback changed what
new_queue.name: What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Work slowing you down
new_queue.name: What part of your growth feels most blocked right now?

new_queue.label: Next step agreement
new_queue.name: What should we agree you will do before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
